# bitbucketdc_default_reviewers (Resource)

Manages Bitbucket Data Center default reviewer conditions for a project or repository. Reconciles the full set of conditions declared in the resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Project-scoped default reviewers
resource "bitbucketdc_default_reviewers" "platform" {
  project_key = "PLAT"

  condition {
    source_matcher_type = "ANY_REF"
    source_matcher_id   = "any"
    target_matcher_type = "BRANCH"
    target_matcher_id   = "main"
    users               = ["alice", "bob"]
    required_approvals  = 1
  }
}

# Repository-scoped default reviewers
resource "bitbucketdc_default_reviewers" "api" {
  project_key     = "PLAT"
  repository_slug = "platform-api"

  condition {
    source_matcher_type = "PATTERN"
    source_matcher_id   = "feature/*"
    target_matcher_type = "BRANCH"
    target_matcher_id   = "main"
    users               = ["alice"]
    required_approvals  = 1
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_key` (String) The project key.

### Optional

- `condition` (Block Set) A default reviewer condition. Each block defines a rule that automatically adds reviewers to pull requests matching the source and target branch criteria. Conditions are identified by their source+target matcher combination. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--condition))
- `repository_slug` (String) The repository slug. When set, conditions are scoped to the repository; when omitted they are scoped to the project.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier: {project_key} or {project_key}/{repository_slug}.

<a id="nestedblock--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `condition`

Required:

- `required_approvals` (Number) Minimum number of approvals required from the listed reviewers before the PR can be merged.
- `source_matcher_id` (String) The source branch matcher value (e.g. ANY_REF_MATCHER_ID, refs/heads/main, feature/*).
- `source_matcher_type` (String) Type of the source branch matcher: ANY_REF, BRANCH, PATTERN, MODEL_BRANCH, or MODEL_CATEGORY.
- `target_matcher_id` (String) The target branch matcher value (e.g. refs/heads/main, release/*).
- `target_matcher_type` (String) Type of the target branch matcher: ANY_REF, BRANCH, PATTERN, MODEL_BRANCH, or MODEL_CATEGORY.
- `users` (List of String) List of user slugs (usernames) to add as required reviewers.
